prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6954→6803→5886→5716→5448，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争逐年加剧），近4年累计前移约1506名；2025年基准约544 8名，为近年最高水平；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021年174人、2022年164人、2023年166人、2024年155人、2025年156人；2026年计划157人，较202 5年小幅扩招1人，扩幅约0.64%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第33名，近年稳定在28–33名区间，属于 国内顶尖理工类高校；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及学生困难认定事件及副教授师德失范事件，可能对报考心理产生轻微降温影响；抖音综合热度排名 第33（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平；历史投档异常方面，2022年曾作为断档黑马被关注，但近年未出现明显断档信号；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与 技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、仪器科学与技术A-、光学工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，在电子信息领域具有顶尖学科实力，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年高热推荐，计算机类推荐（67.8），电气工程及其自动化高热推荐（74.28），相关专业大类持续升温；广东省20 26年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，竞争加剧；电子科技大学位于四川成都，非本省高校；在广东省物理类招生人数约155–174人，占该校全国招生总量比例中等；广东省考生对电子信息类985高校报考意愿较强 ，地域偏好不构成明显抑制。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划微扩、广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%、学校声誉偏负面轻微降温、电子信息类专业高 热推荐等多重因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准5448名基础上小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约5499名，区间4999–5999名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6954 → 6803 → 5886 → 5716 → 5448, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, intensifying competition year by year), with a cumulative advance of about 1506 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 5448, the highest level in recent years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 174 in 2021, 164 in 2022, 166 in 2023, 155 in 2024, and 156 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 157, a slight increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion of about 0.64%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 28–33 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic science and engineering universities; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, involving incidents of student hardship identification and associate professor ethics misconduct, which may have a slight cooling effect on application psychology; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 33rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level; in terms of historical admission anomalies, it was noted as a dark horse in 2022 but has shown no obvious signs of such anomalies in recent years; it has A+ in Information and Communication Engineering, A+ in Electronic Science and Technology, A in Computer Science and Technology, A- in Instrument Science and Technology, A- in Optical Engineering, and A- in Management Science and Engineering, with a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, possessing top-tier disciplinary strength in the field of electronic information, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Computer majors recommended (67.8), Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended (74.28), related major categories continue to heat up; the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province in 2026 is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition; the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university; the number of students enrolled in Physics Category in Guangdong Province is about 155–174, accounting for a moderate proportion of the university's total national enrollment; Guangdong candidates have a strong willingness to apply to 985 universities in the electronic information field, and regional preference does not constitute a significant suppression.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, a slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, an increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, a slight cooling effect from the school's slightly negative reputation, and the high recommendation of electronic information majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 5448, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 5499, in the range of 4999–5999.

It is recommended that candidates within the predicted ranking range use Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 flagship majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 5000) can focus on challenging Tier 1 programs such as UESTC Elite Class, Microelectronics, and Integrated Circuits, which are A+ discipline majors; candidates with rankings near the lower limit of the range (around 6000) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors like Software Engineering and Economic Management Experimental Class, while also considering Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2024–2025 minimum ranking for History Category approximately 3046→2753, 2025 moves forward about 293 places compared to 2024, competition intensifies significantly; 2025 baseline approximately 2753; the university's History Category enrollment plan in Guangdong Province: 6 students in 2024, 7 students in 2025; 2026 plan 8 students, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, expansion rate about 14.3%, relatively large expansion, which has a downward pull on ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Ranking 2026 ranked 33rd, stable in the 28–33 range in recent years; reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, involving student hardship identification incidents and associate professor ethics misconduct incidents, which may have a slight cooling effect on application psychology; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 33rd (relatively hot); University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is strong in science and engineering, History Category enrollment majors (Foreign Language and Literature, Social Science Experimental Class, English) have low correlation with the university's A+ disciplines (Information and Communication Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), disciplinary advantages have limited appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category related majors (foreign language, social science) have generally lukewarm to divided social popularity; Guangdong Province 2026 History Category candidates approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 292,200 in 2025, competition significantly intensifies; University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, not a local university; enrollment numbers for History Category in Guangdong Province are very small (6–8 students), small enrollment scale leads to greater ranking volatility.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as a significant increase of about 11.6% in History Category candidates, enrollment plan expansion of about 14.3% (roughly offsetting each other), slightly negative school reputation, and generally lukewarm History Category majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move back (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 2753, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 3009, range 2558–3460.
